untranslatable_reason: Signal requires weekday-specific entry conditions (Tuesday/Thursday reversals) which cannot be expressed using allowed indicators and operators. Backtest engine lacks day-of-week filtering capability. Additionally, exact probability thresholds marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] are not specified in source material.
translation_notes: Translated the 200-day trend filter component using sma_200 as the primary trend context. Reversal pattern logic on specific weekdays (Tue/Thu) cannot be implemented with current allowed indicators. The source data shows pattern frequencies (39-70%) but lacks actionable entry/exit probability thresholds. Recommend: (1) specify exact win-rate thresholds for pattern activation, (2) add day-of-week filtering to backtester, or (3) use external pre-filter for weekday selection before applying this rule.
